description_for_human: Browse intranet pages using a headed browser running on the user's local machine. The broker relays tool calls to a locally-connected Playwright Runner.
description_for_model: Browse intranet pages using a headed browser running on the user's local machine. The broker relays tool calls to a locally-connected Playwright Runner.

functions.name: bootstrapLogin
functions.description: Open a browser window on the user's machine for interactive intranet sign-in.

functions.name: clickElement
functions.description: Click a previously resolved element by its elementId.

functions.name: inspectDom
functions.description: Return a JSON representation of the DOM for a page.

functions.name: navigate
functions.description: Navigate to a URL. Omit pageId to open a new tab; provide it to reuse an existing tab.

functions.name: screenshot
functions.description: Take a PNG screenshot of a page for diagnostic purposes.

functions.name: selectElement
functions.description: Resolve a CSS selector to a stable element handle reference.

functions.name: sessionStatus
functions.description: Check if the Runner is connected and the intranet session is authenticated.
